questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, including if CSR and Complete Plaster are close competitors and there are not many alternatives or if one is a major supplier and/or distributor to competitors of the other.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with CSR and/or Complete Plaster.
